schema.title: Response Create Scan Api Scan Post
Response Logout Api Auth Logout Post
Response List Users Api Admin Users  Get
Response Get Settings Api Admin Settings  Get
Response Update Settings Api Admin Settings  Put
Response Delete Setting Api Admin Settings  Key  Delete
Response List Policies Api Admin Policies  Get
Response Seed Policies Api Admin Policies Seed Post
Response Get Policy Api Admin Policies  Name  Get
Response Put Policy Api Admin Policies  Name  Put
Response Delete Policy Api Admin Policies  Name  Delete
Response Github Webhook Webhooks Github Post

installation_id.title: Installation Id
installation_id.description: GitHub App installation ID; auto-discovered when omitted

branch.title: Branch
branch.description: Branch to scan; defaults to the repo default branch

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Exact commit SHA to scan; takes precedence over branch

path.title: Path
path.description: Local filesystem path to scan (standalone mode, no GitHub required)

ScanRequest.title: ScanRequest
ScanRequest.description: Request body for baseline repository scan (POST /api/scan).
